system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Deception TN 6
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You are use your internal energy to alter your ap pearance, changing hair length and color, skin tone, and features to resemble another person. Make a Deception roll against TN 6. On a Success you assume the appearance of another person. This is an imperfect disguise however and anyone familiar with the person you are pretending to be may make a Detect roll to discern the charade. The effect lasts twenty minutes per Rank of Qi. On a Total Success it lasts 40 minutes per Rank of Qi. The TN to Detect your deception is 7 + your Ranks in Neigong. To assume a person’s appearance you must have seen them at least once before. Cathartic: You assume the person’s appearance down to the last detail. The only time anyone may detect the Deception is if you give them some reason to believe you are not who you say you are. Otherwise they get no such roll. In addition for anyone to Detect your deception, foes must make two consecutive Detect rolls rather than one.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must have seen them at least once before.

The only time anyone may detect the Deception is if you give them some reason to believe you are not who you say you are. Otherwise they get no such roll. In addition for anyone to Detect your deception, foes must make two consecutive Detect rolls rather than one.
